creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Does this also happen with lang/gcc49?

I'm afraid I lack expertise in this aspect of (packaging) GCC, but
at least now there is some effort going on to upgrade lang/gcc from
GCC 4.8 to GCC 4.9 (after the two upgrades from 4.6 to 4.7 and 4.7
to 4.8 I did in the last eighteen months).
